_legend.About: A small quality-of-life set for any PowerShell user. Everything ships as Mode=Ignore - flip what you use to Load or InstallOnly.

Modules.Name: Terminal-Icons
Modules.Description: File and folder glyphs in directory listings

Modules.Name: PSReadLine
Modules.Description: Command-line editing, history search, predictions (usually pre-installed; CheckOnly keeps psmm from touching it)

Modules.Name: Microsoft.PowerShell.ConsoleGuiTools
Modules.Description: Interactive grid view in the terminal
